school.school_name: Galileo Academy of Science and Technology

art_competition_entry.description_line_1: A detailed streetscape of San Francisco’s Mission District at sunset, focusing on layered reflections in the windows of small businesses and apartments.
art_competition_entry.description_line_2: The piece highlights the contrast between old neighborhood murals and new storefronts, using warm oranges and cool blues to show both tension and coexistence.
art_competition_entry.description_line_3: Reference photos were taken by the artist on 24th Street; final work emphasizes everyday residents—families, cyclists, and street vendors—visible as silhouettes in the glass.
